title: CobbleCats [cobblemon]
description:
Adds cat pokemon to cobblemon.

Requires Cobblemon.
body:
Adds cat pokemon to cobblemon.

Implemented:
- Skitty: non-freezing villages and cherry biomes (more common at night, non-raining)
- Delcatty: non-freezing villages and cherry biomes (more common at night, non-raining)
- Glameow: villages (more common at night)
- Purugly: villages (more common at night)
- Espurr: the end
- Meowstic: the end
- Zeraora: badlands and forests
- Stunky: Swamps (more common at night)
- Skuntank: Swamps (more common at night)
- Litleo: Savanna, badlands and jungles
- Pyroar: Savanna, badlands and jungles
- Spoink: Plains, crimson and warped forests
- Grumpig: Plains, crimson and warped forests

Older Versions (Removed in 1.5.1):

- Purrloin: Jungles, savannas and deserts (more common at night)
- Liepard: Jungles, savannas and deserts (more common at night)


Requires Cobblemon. Should be added as both a resourcepack and datapack to work properly.
